Live arrival guarantee: Most breeders include a live arrival guarantee (LAG) with overnight or 2-day shipping. Check individual seller shipping policies before ordering. Live insects are temperature-sensitive — avoid ordering during extreme heat or cold.

Buying tips

Look for captive-bred specimens over wild-caught for better health and temperament. Juveniles around 2-3 inches are ideal - old enough to be hardy but young enough to observe growth. Avoid specimens that appear lethargic or have shriveled abdomens, which may indicate dehydration.
